abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Portable Portal
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an ally ends a move in base contact with this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to place that ally anywhere within 6" of this model.

abilities.name: Steam Vent
abilities.text: While this model has a Burning token, the area within 3" of it is hazardous terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Corrupted Chains
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" toward this model.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

actions.name: Burn Away Pain
actions.effects: This model heals 2 and gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Heatwave
triggers.text: Models within (aura)2" gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Sparking Remains
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a Remains or Scrap marker.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)3" of the target must pass a TN 14 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Safety Measures
triggers.text: Allies within (aura)3" of the target heal 1.
